description:
Create a custom 'All-Black' solar module in SketchUp Make 2017 and use Skelion to array it on a roof.

Start by creating a simple shed roof building. Then, model a single custom solar panel with the exact dimensions of a REC Alpha Pure-R module: 1730 mm long x 1118 mm wide x 30 mm thick. Apply a dark grey or black material to this panel so it appears 'All-Black', and turn it into a Component named 'REC_Alpha_Black'.

Finally, use the Skelion plugin to insert an array of these custom panels onto the south-facing roof slope. Ensure Skelion is configured to use your custom 'REC_Alpha_Black' component rather than its default library panels. The array should consist of at least 6 panels.

Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\black_panel_project.skp'.
